highlights.content: `aida build` now generates repo-level `.aida/rules/_all.md` alongside tool-specific artifacts and auto-creates missing AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md guide references.
Verified the migration chain end-to-end and aligned rule references so `.aida/rules/_all.md` now exists as the repo-level fallback while tool-specific `_all.md` files remain the primary entrypoint.

Validated bootstrap status/manifest/complete flow plus aggregated aida_task/aida_record/aida_memory behavior against real-project wiring; targeted MCP/init/build/migrate tests and full npm test suite now pass end-to-end.

Release-path validation now includes real built-command execution inside the AIDA repo itself, root-level rules conflict sample verification, MCP bootstrap/task/record/memory handshake, package dry-run, and a slash-module memory-path regression fix proven by real migrate-legacy rerun.
